description: DaniWeb operates a technology community and a related Connect networking product. Its services include public forum content and a business-networking platform with user matching, messaging, and single sign-on capabilities.
summary: DaniWeb exposes two public developer HTTP surfaces: the OAuth-protected DaniWeb Connect API at `https://www.daniweb.com/connect/api/v4` and a public read-only Forum API at `https://www.daniweb.com/api`.
